sine_ms_bridge

Bridge that converts oscillator inputs to sine waves. Also defines the proxy necessary for UVM driver and monitor to configure during execution, but parametrized so as to be able to work without them.

Works with an internal oscillator interface, so UVM testbenches will not have to instantiate them.

Functions
sample
virtual task sample (
output 
real 
amplitude
)

Blocking sample that makes sure frequency changes if it's going to change
